name: Easy Cheesecake (Red Lobster)
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Pk Lorna Doone cookies, crushed
16 oz Cream cheese, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the crushed cookies with melted butter, sugar, and gelatin. Pat the mixture evenly into the bottom of a greased 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for exactly 8 minutes.
3. Beat the cream cheese, sour cream, eggs, butter, cornstarch, sugar, and vanilla together until smooth and creamy.
4. Pour the filling into the crust.
5. Return to the oven and bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30-35 minutes or until a knife inserted comes out clean.
6. Cool in the pan on a rack for 20 minutes before releasing the springform from the cake.
7. Cool another 20 minutes before cutting.
8. Sprinkle with crushed cookie crumbs on top.
Source: Gloria Pitzer's Secret Recipes Newsletter.
